ddls:
CREATE TABLE "markets" (
  "market_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market */,
  "market_name" TEXT /* Name of the market (e.g., NASDAQ, NYSE, Forex) */,
  "market_type" TEXT /* Type of market (e.g., equity, forex, futures) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the market */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the market */,
  "trading_hours_start" TEXT /* Start time of trading hours */,
  "trading_hours_end" TEXT /* End time of trading hours */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the market (e.g., open, closed) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the market details */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("market_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assets" (
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each asset */,
  "asset_name" TEXT /* Name of the asset (e.g., Apple, Google, EUR/USD) */,
  "asset_type" TEXT /* Type of asset (e.g., stock, option, future) */,
  "market_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the market where the asset is traded */,
  "isin" TEXT /* International Securities Identification Number (ISIN) for the asset */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Unique symbol or ticker for the asset */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the asset is traded */,
  "last_price" REAL /* Last known price of the asset */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the asset details */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("asset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assets_market_id FOREIGN KEY ("market_id") REFERENCES markets ("market_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_data" (
  "trading_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading data record */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset being traded */,
  "open_time" INTEGER /* Unix timestamp for the trading data */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the asset */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the asset */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the asset */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the asset */,
  "volume" REAL /* Trading volume */,
  "close_time" INTEGER /* Unix timestamp for the closing data */,
  "trading_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the trading data (e.g., minute, hour, day) */,
  "volume_weighted_average_price" REAL /* Volume-weighted average price (VWAP) */,
  "number_of_trades" INTEGER /* Number of trades during the time period */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the trading data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trading_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_data_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, trader, analyst) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "accounts" (
  "account_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading account */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user owning the account */,
  "account_name" TEXT /* Name of the trading account */,
  "account_type" TEXT /* Type of trading account (e.g., live, demo) */,
  "leverage" REAL /* Leverage level of the trading account */,
  "margin" REAL /* Margin level of the trading account */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the account was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the account details */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("account_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading order */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trading account placing the order */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset being traded */,
  "order_type" TEXT /* Type of trading order (e.g., market, limit) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the asset being traded */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the asset */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the trading order (e.g., open, closed) */,
  "side" TEXT /* Side of the order (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "order_status_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the order status */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the order was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES accounts ("account_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading transaction */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trading order being executed */,
  "time" INTEGER /* Unix timestamp for the transaction */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the asset being traded */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the asset */,
  "fee" REAL /* Transaction fee */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., buy, sell, fee) */,
  "related_order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the related order */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the transaction was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_news" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "market_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market being reported on */,
  "time" INTEGER /* Unix timestamp for the news article */,
  "headline" TEXT /* Headline of the news article */,
  "body" TEXT /* Body of the news article */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the news article (e.g., Reuters, Bloomberg) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the news article was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the news article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_news_market_id FOREIGN KEY ("market_id") REFERENCES markets ("market_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analyst_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analyst report */,
  "market_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market being reported on */,
  "time" INTEGER /* Unix timestamp for the analyst report */,
  "headline" TEXT /* Headline of the analyst report */,
  "body" TEXT /* Body of the analyst report */,
  "author" TEXT /* Name of the analyst who wrote the report */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the report (e.g., internal, external) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyst_reports_market_id FOREIGN KEY ("market_id") REFERENCES markets ("market_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "accounts_balances" (
  "account_balance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each account balance record */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trading account */,
  "balance" REAL /* Current balance of the trading account */,
  "time" INTEGER /* Unix timestamp for the balance record */,
  "balance_type" TEXT /* Type of balance (e.g., available, margin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the balance record was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the balance record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("account_balance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accounts_balances_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES accounts ("account_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders_history" (
  "order_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order history record */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trading order */,
  "time" INTEGER /* Unix timestamp for the order history record */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the asset being traded */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the asset */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the trading order */,
  "side" TEXT /* Side of the order (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "order_status_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the order status */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the order history record was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the order history record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_history_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)
